    <h1 {...{
      "id": "creating-html-elements"
    }}>{`Creating HTML Elements`}</h1>
    <p>{`Build user interfaces using HTML markup or JavaScript DOM methods`}</p>
    <p>{`UXP lets you create UI elements in two ways: `}<strong parentName="p">{`define them in HTML`}</strong>{` or `}<strong parentName="p">{`create them dynamically with JavaScript`}</strong>{`. Both approaches work for Panel plugins, while Command plugins can only create modal dialogs using JavaScript.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "prerequisites"
    }}>{`Prerequisites`}</h2>
    <p>{`Before you begin, make sure your development environment uses the following versions:`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Premiere v25.6`}</strong>{` or higher`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`UDT v2.2`}</strong>{` or higher`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Manifest version v5`}</strong>{` or higher`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "example-using-html-markup"
    }}>{`Example: Using HTML Markup`}</h2>
    <p>{`Define your UI structure in HTML, then control it with JavaScript.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="3" languages="HTML, JavaScript, CSS" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "indexhtml"
    }}>{`index.html`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-html"
      }}>{`<button id="showDialog">Show Dialog</button>

<dialog id="sampleDialog">
  <div>
    <h1>Hello! 👋</h1>
    <p>A dialog built using HTML tags</p>
  </div>
</dialog>
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "indexjs"
    }}>{`index.js`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`const showDialogBtn = document.getElementById("showDialog");
showDialogBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
  const dialog = document.getElementById("sampleDialog");
  dialog.show();

  dialog.addEventListener("cancel", () => {
    console.log("Dialog dismissed");
  });
});
`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "stylescss"
    }}>{`styles.css`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-css"
      }}>{`#sampleDialog > div {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 300px;
  width: 400px;
  align-items: center;
  color:#DDD;
}

h1 { color: #FFF; }

#sampleDialog > div > p {
  margin-top: 30px;
}

`}</code></pre>

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "example-using-javascript-only"
    }}>{`Example: Using JavaScript Only`}</h2>
    <p>{`Create and style elements dynamically using JavaScript DOM methods.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="2" languages="HTML, JavaScript" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "indexhtml-1"
    }}>{`index.html`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-html"
      }}>{`<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
  <head>
    <script src="main.js"></script>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css" />
  </head>

  <body>
    <button id="showDialog">Show Dialog</button>
  </body>
</html>

`}</code></pre>
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "indexjs-1"
    }}>{`index.js`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`const showDialogBtn = document.getElementById("showDialog");
showDialogBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
  // Create dialog element
  const dialog = document.createElement("dialog");


  // Create container
  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.style.display = "flex";
  div.style.flexDirection = "column";
  div.style.height = "300px";
  div.style.width = "400px";
  div.style.alignItems = "center";
  div.style.color = "#DDD"; // Apply UXP host text color

  // Create header
  const header = document.createElement("h1");
  header.textContent = "Hello! 👋";
  header.style.color = "#FFF";
  div.appendChild(header);

  // Create paragraph
  const para = document.createElement("p");
  para.textContent = "A dialog built dynamically with JavaScript";
  para.style.marginTop = "30px";
  div.appendChild(para);

  // Assemble and show
  dialog.appendChild(div);
  document.body.appendChild(dialog);
  dialog.showModal();

  dialog.addEventListener("cancel", () => {
    console.log("Dialog dismissed");
  });
});
`}</code></pre>

            "alt": "Sample dialog created with JavaScript",
            "title": "Sample dialog created with JavaScript",
            "loading": "lazy",
            "style": {

              "height": "100%",
              "margin": "0",
              "verticalAlign": "middle",
              "position": "absolute",
              "opacity": "0",
              "transition": "opacity 0.5s",

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "creating-spectrum-components"
    }}>{`Creating Spectrum Components`}</h2>
    <p>{`You can use `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`document.createElement()`}</inlineCode>{` to create Spectrum UI elements dynamically:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-js"
      }}>{`// Create a Spectrum button
const button = document.createElement("sp-button");
button.textContent = "Click me";
button.setAttribute("variant", "cta");
document.body.appendChild(button);
`}</code></pre>
    <InlineAlert variant="info" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`This approach works for `}<strong parentName="p">{`Spectrum Widgets`}</strong>{` (`}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`sp-*`}</inlineCode>{` elements). For `}<strong parentName="p">{`Spectrum Web Components`}</strong>{`, you must define them in HTML markup.`}</p>
